nasb.text: O God, the nations have invaded Your inheritance; They have defiled Your holy temple; They have laid Jerusalem in ruins.

esv.text: O God, the nations have come into your inheritance; they have defiled your holy temple; they have laid Jerusalem in ruins.

cnv.text: 神啊！外族人侵入你的產業， 污穢了你的聖殿， 使耶路撒冷成為廢墟。

ccb.text: 上帝啊， 外族人侵占你的产业， 玷污你的圣殿， 使耶路撒冷沦为废墟。

csbs.text: 神哪，列国进入了你的继业， 玷污了你圣洁的殿， 使耶路撒冷变为荒堆！
